message:
feat(deps): upgrade frankensqlite to rev 05a5820 for pager read-only freelist skip

Updates frankensqlite to include the read-only pager freelist skip fix.
When PagerInner has readonly=true (set by open_readonly_with_cx), the
refresh_committed_state() function now skips the expensive freelist
chain traversal. Combined with READONLY VFS flags and journal recovery
skip, this makes FrankenStorage::open_readonly() truly instant on
multi-GB databases.

Changes in frankensqlite 05a5820:
- PagerInner gains `readonly: bool` field
- refresh_committed_state() skips load_freelist_from_committed_state()
  when readonly=true
- open_readonly_with_cx sets readonly=true; open_with_cx sets false
- All existing test PagerInner constructors set readonly=false

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
